creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Have a Seafood Fiesta this Saturday at 24th St! 

🦀 Treat yourself to premium seafood - fresh prawns, local blue crab, calamari rings, and clams! 

🥘 Choose your sauce - Cajun, Salted Egg, Thai Red Curry, or Chinese. We love their signature Thai Red Curry sauce. Savory, spicy and aromatic!

⭐️ Add chicken/beef sausage for a robust flavor that complements with the sweetness of the seafood! Pair it with refreshing mojito. Dine with Burj Khalifa view! 

💰AED 189 for 2, served with unlimited rice
🕖 Every Saturday, 7 to 11 PM
📍 @24thstdubai @dusitthanidubai 

Tag your friends!
